title: ECG: ST elevation
body_html:
Causes of ST elevation
  • myocardial infarction
  • pericarditis
  • normal variant - 'high take-off'
  • left ventricular aneurysm
  • Prinzmetal's angina (coronary artery spasm)
  • rare: subarachnoid haemorrhage
